Thank you very much for your valuable enquiry, please find below our techno commercial proposal for your kind consideration.

Enertech® provides a comprehensive wide range of Power management solutions in:

  1. Solar Hybrid Inverter,
  2. Solar UPS, Online UPS,
  3. Industrial UPS, Industrial Inverter
  4. Battery Charger,
  5. Static Frequency Converter.
1. Bankability

  • On-site product training. [cite: 39]

4. Manufacturing & Development facility
    [cite_start]
  • Expertise of ARM, DSPic, ATMEL & TEXAS processors. [cite: 44]
    • [cite_start]
  • Expertise on MATLAB License software. [cite: 46]
    • [cite_start]

We hope you will find our offer in line with your requirement. [cite_start]Should you have any clarification, please feel free to contact us. [cite: 50, 51]
